name: token-age
description: Given a Solana mint address, report the token's on-chain age plus live mint and freeze authority status.

mint.description: base58 Solana mint address to inspect

config.description: optional { HELIUS_RPC_URL } override; defaults to env then public mainnet

program.description: token or token-2022, from the mint account owner

oldest_signature.description: the oldest signature for the mint address, or null

created_at.description: ISO8601 block time of the oldest signature, or null

created_slot.description: slot of the oldest signature, or null

age.description: compact human age, e.g. 3d 4h, or null

mint_authority.description: base58 mint authority, or null if revoked

freeze_authority.description: base58 freeze authority, or null if revoked

signatures_scanned.description: how many signatures were paged through to find the oldest

caveats.description: honest notes: no blockTime, no signatures, or a truncated scan

result.reason: created 2026-07-12T...; mint authority revoked; freeze authority revoked; token-2022 program

config.HELIUS_RPC_URL: <env HELIUS_RPC_URL at runtime — never committed; falls back to https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com>
